# Documentation Templates

This directory contains templates that ensure consistency across documentation.

## Available Templates

- [Component Documentation](./component-docs.md) — Template for documenting React components
- [API Endpoint Documentation](./api-endpoint-docs.md) — Template for documenting API endpoints
- [Feature Documentation](./feature-docs.md) — Template for documenting features

## Usage

1. Copy the relevant template file
2. Fill in the metadata fields
3. Write content following the section structure
4. Save with an appropriate filename in the relevant docs directory

## Documentation Standards

- Write in clear, plain English
- Include code examples for all APIs
- Describe the "why" in addition to the "how"
- Keep documentation close to the code it describes
